room.caption: [ControlCenterB] I like the music here.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(9)
if global.gameProgress=930 global.gameProgress=940
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh5MainA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(3) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
